scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @roorq/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @roorq/vendor-app build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @roorq/web lint && corepack pnpm --filter @roorq/vendor-app lint
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @roorq/web build && corepack pnpm test:karma
